THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBERTS, ALFRED A. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 20 12TH STREET, #238 $591.50 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $591.50, LEASE FORFEITED, EA SIDE TO BEAR THERE OWN COST AND ATTORNEY'S FEES,IF DEFT. APPL. FOR FOR STAY ON 2/15/94 HE CAN HAVE STAY UNTIL 3/2/94 6AM. IF HE MAKES PAYMENTS AS AGREED. PAYMENTS MUST BE MADE BY CASHIER CHECK OR MONEY ORDER, PAYMENT CONSIDERED TIMELY IF PAID BY 5 PM ON DATE DUE. DEFT. WAIVES FURTHER STAYS.
